item.title: Ukulele Time Yuji: Rhythm Of The Rain - The Cascades - Key of G
item.description: Play along video for the song Rhythm Of The Rain from the channel Ukulele Time Yuji. Artist: The Cascades. Chords: Am, Bm, C, D7, Em, G, G7.

item.title: ucanlele (ukulele tutorial): Stairway To Heaven - Led Zeppelin - Key of Am
item.description: Play along video for the song Stairway To Heaven from the channel ucanlele (ukulele tutorial). Artist: Led Zeppelin. Chords: Am, Am/G, Am/G♯, Am7, C, D, Dsus4, Em, Em7, F, Fmaj7, G.

item.title: Miss Oli: Tayong Dalawa - Rey Valera
item.description: Play along video for the song Tayong Dalawa from the channel Miss Oli. Artist: Rey Valera. Chords: A, A7, Am, B, Bm, C, Cm, D7, E7, Em, G.

item.title: Ukulele Time Yuji: Mr. Sandman - The Chordettes - Key of C
item.description: Play along video for the song Mr. Sandman from the channel Ukulele Time Yuji. Artist: The Chordettes. Chords: A7, A♭7, B7, C, Cmaj7, D7, Dm7, E7, Fm6, G7.

item.title: ukulele plus: Bread And Butter - The Newbeats - Key of D
item.description: Play along video for the song Bread And Butter from the channel ukulele plus. Artist: The Newbeats. Chords: A, D, G.

item.title: Ukulele Time Yuji: Lean On Me - Bill Withers - Key of C
item.description: Play along video for the song Lean On Me from the channel Ukulele Time Yuji. Artist: Bill Withers. Chords: C, Dm, Em, F, G7.

item.title: ukulenny: What's Going On - Marvin Gaye - Key of G
item.description: Play along video for the song What's Going On from the channel ukulenny. Artist: Marvin Gaye. Chords: Am, Cm, D7, Em7, G.

item.title: ukeplayalongs: Little Do You Know - Alex & Sierra - Key of C
item.description: Play along video for the song Little Do You Know from the channel ukeplayalongs. Artist: Alex & Sierra. Chords: Am, C, F, G, Gsus4.

item.title: Ukulele Time Yuji: Landslide - Fleetwood Mac - Key of C
item.description: Play along video for the song Landslide from the channel Ukulele Time Yuji. Artist: Fleetwood Mac. Chords: Am7, C, D, Em, G.

item.title: Ukulele Time Yuji: El Condor Pasa - Simon & Garfunkel - Key of Em
item.description: Play along video for the song El Condor Pasa from the channel Ukulele Time Yuji. Artist: Simon & Garfunkel. Chords: B7, C, D7, Em, G.

item.title: ukulele plus: All We Ever Knew - The Head and the Heart - Key of C
item.description: Play along video for the song All We Ever Knew from the channel ukulele plus. Artist: The Head and the Heart. Chords: Am, C, F, G.

item.title: Ukulele Time Yuji: Aquarela - Toquinho - Key of C
item.description: Play along video for the song Aquarela from the channel Ukulele Time Yuji. Artist: Toquinho. Chords: Am, Am7, B♭maj7, C, D7, E7, Em7, F, F/G, G7.

item.title: Miss Oli: Luha - Aegis - Key of A
item.description: Play along video for the song Luha from the channel Miss Oli. Artist: Aegis. Chords: A, C♯m, D, E, F♯m.

item.title: Miss Oli: Story Of My Life - One Direction - Key of C
item.description: Play along video for the song Story Of My Life from the channel Miss Oli. Artist: One Direction. Chords: Am, C, F, G.

item.title: ukeplayalongs: Dancing Queen - ABBA - Key of G
item.description: Play along video for the song Dancing Queen from the channel ukeplayalongs. Artist: ABBA. Chords: A7, Am, B7, C, D, D7, Em, G.

item.title: Miss Oli: I See You Lord - Aiza Seguerra - Key of D
item.description: Play along video for the song I See You Lord from the channel Miss Oli. Artist: Aiza Seguerra. Chords: A, A7, Bm, D, E, Em, F♯m, G, Gm.

item.title: UNI Modern Band: Blown Away - Carrie Underwood - Key of Am
item.description: Play along video for the song Blown Away from the channel UNI Modern Band. Artist: Carrie Underwood. Chords: Am, C, G.

item.title: Miss Oli: Ang Pipit - Levi Celerio - Key of G
item.description: Play along video for the song Ang Pipit from the channel Miss Oli. Artist: Levi Celerio. Chords: Am, C, Cm, D7, Em, G.

item.title: Ukulele Time Yuji: Boulevard Of Broken Dreams - Green Day - Key of Em
item.description: Play along video for the song Boulevard Of Broken Dreams from the channel Ukulele Time Yuji. Artist: Green Day. Chords: A, A7, B7, C, D, Em, G.

item.title: ukulele plus: September Fields - Frazey Ford
item.description: Play along video for the song September Fields from the channel ukulele plus. Artist: Frazey Ford. Chords: Am, C, F.
